evals.prompt: Plan adding JWT authentication to the API with refresh tokens, token rotation, and logout support.
evals.expected_output: Claude launches a Plan agent, saves plan to .claude/plan/, calls Codex with read-only sandbox for audit, iterates until APPROVED, presents plan and stops.
expectations: Claude launches a Task agent with subagent_type 'Plan' for plan creation
Claude saves the plan to .claude/plan/<feature-name>.md using Write tool
Claude reads codex-analyzer-role.md from the skill directory
Claude calls mcp__codex__codex with sandbox set to 'read-only'
The Codex call includes developer-instructions from codex-analyzer-role.md
Claude presents the plan and instructs user to run /execute-codex to implement
Claude does NOT modify any production code
Claude does NOT auto-execute the plan

evals.prompt: Plan migrating our environment variable configuration from process.env usage scattered across files to a typed config module with validation.
evals.expected_output: Claude creates plan, Codex audits with issues, Claude revises and re-submits via codex-reply, eventually APPROVED.
expectations: Claude saves the plan to .claude/plan/ before calling Codex
Claude calls mcp__codex__codex with approval-policy 'never' (read-only audit)
If Codex returns issues, Claude revises the plan file before re-auditing
Claude uses mcp__codex__codex-reply (not a new mcp__codex__codex call) for iterations 2-3
Claude reuses the saved threadId for follow-up audit calls
After 3 iterations without APPROVED, Claude stops and asks user for direction

evals.expected_output: Claude asks clarifying questions before launching the planner — the input is too vague.
expectations: Claude identifies the input as ambiguous or lacking detail
Claude asks the user clarifying questions before proceeding
Claude does NOT launch the Plan agent with the vague description as-is
Claude uses AskUserQuestion or outputs a question to the user

evals.prompt: Plan adding a WebSocket notification system for real-time order updates.
evals.expected_output: Claude detects Codex MCP is unavailable and stops — does NOT deliver an unaudited plan.
expectations: Claude launches Plan agent and creates the plan successfully
Claude checks for mcp__codex__codex availability before Phase 2
Claude stops and tells the user that Codex MCP is not available
Claude mentions the audit loop is this skill's core value
Claude does NOT deliver the plan without Codex audit
Claude does NOT fall back to a non-Codex review
